privileged_info_summary: The task relies on Subsurface's internal enum mapping for unit settings. By inspecting the Subsurface C++ source code (core/units.h), it is confirmed that the required imperial units (Feet, PSI, Fahrenheit, Lbs, and CuFt) all map exactly to the integer value '1' in the .conf file, confirming all metadata claims. The data file (SampleDivesV2.ssrf) contains real dive logs directly from actual dive computers.
